description: A vertical graphic on a light blue background with a faint Department of Homeland Security seal watermark. Italic serif text at the top reads Green cards are for those who follow the law, with bold text below reading not those who break it. The lower portion shows a photograph of a United States of America Permanent Resident card marked SPECIMEN, bearing a sample headshot and placeholder data including country of birth Bahamas.
notable_text: Green cards are for those who follow the law, not those who break it; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA PERMANENT RESIDENT; SPECIMEN
